list.pageDescription: Paste any job description — Gemini extracts requirements, scores your match, and generates interview questions.
list.emptyDescription: Paste a job description and Gemini will tell you your match score, missing skills, and the interview questions you'll face.

new.pageDescription: Paste a job description. Gemini will extract the requirements, score your match, and generate interview questions.

detail.pageDescription: Match score, skill gaps, interview questions, and resume tips for this role.

form.jobDescriptionHint: Paste the full job posting. The more complete, the more accurate the analysis.
form.jobDescriptionPlaceholder: Paste the entire job description here — title, requirements, responsibilities, company info…
form.helperText: AI reads the job description and your full profile. Takes ~15 seconds.

result.suggestedAnswer: Suggested answer — based on your profile
result.noMatchingStoryDetail: Nothing in your Story Bank or Experience covers this yet — add a STAR story or fill in more detail on a role to get a grounded draft here.
result.answerPlaceholder: Write how you'd actually answer this in an interview…
